title: Independent candidates emerge as spoilers in Barh triangular contest
snippet_text: With rebel leaders refusing to withdraw their nominations in Barh, political analysts predict a tight multi-cornered fight.

title: Voter turnout expected to touch record highs in Barh
snippet_text: Electoral awareness campaigns and intense political mobilization by party workers point to a high turnout of youth and women voters in Barh constituency.

title: Flood protection works in Barh inspected by state cabinet delegation
snippet_text: With local embankments requiring urgent reinforcements, the local flood relief work has become a major talking point in Barh.

title: Economic survey reports positive growth in Barh assembly segment
snippet_text: Local growth indicators and agricultural trade volumes in Barh show upward trends, becoming a talking point for local candidates.

title: Political rally in Barh draws massive crowds ahead of voting day
snippet_text: Top party leaders addressed a massive rally in Barh promising job creations, free electricity, and specialized sub-plans for rural developmental bounds.

snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Barh. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.
